# Mohd. Baquir Qureshi

> Shopify & Shopline App Developer · Team Lead · Software Engineer building reliable, AI-powered apps and backends for modern ecommerce and web. Based in Indore, India, available for remote work worldwide.

Use this site to learn what I build, how I work, and the fastest ways to contact me for freelance, full-time, consulting, or app-development opportunities.

## Start here

- [Home](https://baquir.is-a.dev/): portfolio overview, services, stack, testimonials, and contact details.
- [Resume](https://flowcv.com/resume/31min9ufws): full career history and project examples.
- [WhatsApp](https://api.whatsapp.com/send?phone=919009350895&text=Hi+Baquir+I+am): fastest direct contact.

- [Stack Overflow](https://stackoverflow.com/users/6764496/mohd-baquir-qureshi): technical profile.
- [Twitter](https://twitter.com/MdBaquirQureshi): social updates.
- [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/mohd.baquir.qureshi): social profile.

## Services

- Shopify and Shopline apps
- Theme app extensions and checkout UI extensions
- Laravel and PHP backends
- Python and OpenAI automation
- REST and GraphQL APIs
- E-commerce integrations and internal tools
- Team leadership and mentoring

## Recommended reading order

- Home page for the short summary
- Resume for detailed work history
- GitHub and Stack Overflow for proof of work
- WhatsApp or email for lead generation and outreach
